summary: CLI AI DX Optimization mission fully delivered. All 5 scope_in items shipped: schema template commands (15 types with ref resolution), validation error hints, envelope auto-injection, output format unification, and skill inline schema cleanup. 4 tasks passed through full verification pipeline. 18 regression tests added. Security review approved with no concerns. 3 low-severity structural debt items tracked for future cleanup. One acceptance criterion (48-failure-pattern test) was reasonably adapted since no documented failure list existed. warn() output format deferred per vote round consensus.
rationale: This mission directly solves the stated problem: AI agents can now construct correct CLI JSON payloads without guessing schema structures. The schema template command provides exact fill-in templates, validation errors now include actionable hints (field names, enum values, required/optional), and envelope auto-injection removes 5 boilerplate fields agents previously had to manage. All acceptance criteria met or reasonably adapted. Debt is low-severity and structural only — no functional gaps. Security posture verified. The product is materially better for its target users (AI agents) and backward compatible for existing workflows.
